subcodes.first_line: O Solomon! The days draw nigh unto their end, while the peoples of the earth are observed in manifest heedlessness and evident error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیمان ایام نزدیک باخر است و اهل ارض در غفلت مبین و ضلالت آشکار مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @empty learning; false spirituality, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
